items.title: I seldom use AI for writing because I actually enjoy writing and find it very easy & fun to do…
items.content: I seldom use AI for writing because I actually enjoy writing and find it very easy & fun to do And because I have a high bar for writing, if I use AI to write, it almost always ends up taking more time than if I had written it by myself (too many iterations) For me personally, AI has been most useful for helping me with things OUTSIDE my comfort zone (like coding), not inside of it (like writing)

items.title: Duolingo-style language tutorial deck with interactive quizzes. Prompt: Create a Duolingo-style…
items.content: Duolingo-style language tutorial deck with interactive quizzes. Prompt: Create a Duolingo-style interactive and UI-driven slide deck for English learning that combines text and visuals in an engaging, educational way. Provide key vocabulary and sentences with Japanese–English pairings. Include interactive elements to enhance engagement, such as an experience points (XP) system and a quiz after each dialogue. Enable mouse hover to trigger corresponding English audio with a light, cheerful tone.…

items.title: Introducing the Personalized Podcast skill: Turn anything into a podcast with 2 AI hosts, publi…
items.content: Introducing the Personalized Podcast skill: Turn anything into a podcast with 2 AI hosts, publish it as an RSS feed, and listen to the show in your favorite podcast app on the go I've been remixing my meeting transcripts into podcasts where the AIs "eavesdrop" on my conversation & comment on their impression of me. It's insane This is the age of "content for one" Link below

items.title: Before shipping a product built with AI, the most important step is to think about what feature…
items.content: Before shipping a product built with AI, the most important step is to think about what features you can CUT, not what features you can add
items.summary: Before shipping a product built with AI, the most important step is to think about what features you can CUT, not what features you can add
